"'''The Starman'''" was a canceled episode of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. In the episode, an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] crashes on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] give aid to the pilot, but are soon attacked, and the pilot has to decide whether to help them or leave. [[ABC Television Network|ABC]] rejected the episode concept because it was "too Star Warsy."<ref name="insider" />
